response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure experience, particularly at re:cinq, with relevant skills in TypeScript, MCP (Model Context Protocol), and agentic workflows. While his AI/GenAI experience is less explicitly detailed than required, his technical leadership, cloud exposure, and open-source contributions suggest potential. A deeper dive into his AI-specific projects and stakeholder leadership is warranted.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud technologies, aligning with job requirements.
Proven technical leadership and mentorship, including contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators.
Strong open-source portfolio (e.g., GISCollective) demonstrating initiative and hands-on expertise in data pipelines and systems design.
concerns: AI/GenAI experience is not explicitly detailed; 8+ years of 'building and shipping production-grade AI solutions' is unclear.
Limited mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM performance metrics in resume.
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI/CS, though this is a preferred qualification.
